zh.lifeSummary: 當Mirabel Wake於1307年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾文特爾布恩 斯托克時，她的父親Sir Hugh Wake II35歲，母親Joan Belauney33歲。她於1329年9月16日之前與Hugh Porter在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1355年6月在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for ‘(man of) the watch’, from Middle English wak, wake ‘wake, vigil, watch, period of guard duty’ (Old English wacu, Old Norse vaka). It alternates with the synonymous Middle English wache (Old English wacce), hence the variant Watch. The surname was also interchangeable with Waite (the equivalent Old French term) which, like Wake, was sometimes translated as Latin vigil ‘(one who is) watchful, alert’. Compare the synonymous Vail . When the bearers had high social status, the surname probably denoted an officer with responsibility for the security of a castle, town, or royal person. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Vail
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French de la veille ‘of the watch, watchman’, with loss of de; compare Wake . There has been some confusion with the topographic name Vale and the nickname Veal .
Scottish: shortened and altered form of McPhail , Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phàil ‘son of Paul’.

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: Mirabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Pedro, Fernando, Pablo, Miguel, Carlos, Luis, Elena, Gerardo, Guillermo, Hortensia.

Aragonese: variant of Miraval, a habitational name from Miraval, in Aragon, formed with mirar ‘to look, survey, admire’ + vall ‘valley’. This surname is rare in Aragon; in Spain it is found mainly in the Canary Islands.

en.lifeSummary: When Mirabel Wake was born in 1307, in Winterbourne Stoke, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh Wake II, was 35 and her mother, Joan Belauney, was 33. She married Hugh Porter before 16 September 1329, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in June 1355, in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

Elle a épousé Hugh Porter avant 16 septembre 1329, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1355, à Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mirabel Wakeが1307年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアウィンテルボウルン ストクで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Wake IIは35歳，母Joan Belauneyは33歳であった。1329年9月16日以前にイギリスでHugh Porterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1355年6月にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリスウオルスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mirabel Wake(이)가 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 윈터보우른 스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Wake II(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Belauney(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1329년 9월 16일 이전 영국에서 Hugh Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 블리스워스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mirabel Wake родилась в 1307 г. в местности винтирбурн сток, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Wake II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Belauney, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Porter перед 16 сентябрь 1329 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла июнь 1355 г. в местности блисворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
